mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_interface_call_count (user_id, interface_info_id, total_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{interfaceInfoId}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_count = total_count + 1
mapper.select: select sum(total_count) from user_interface_call_count where user_id=#{userId}
select i.url as interfacePath, u.total_count as successCount from user_interface_call_count u inner join interface_info i on u.interface_info_id=i.id where u.user_id=#{userId}
